# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [1.0.0] - 2026-06-30

### Added
- Initial public release
- Chrome Extension MV3 architecture
- Network blocking via declarativeNetRequest
- Cosmetic filtering (CSS hiding)
- DOM removal for ad elements
- AdGuard scriptlet support for anti-adblock circumvention
- Per-site allowlist functionality
- Global on/off toggle
